docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, JOSEFINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERMUNDEZ, ALEXANDER $1,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,985.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED AUG-22-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BERMUNDEZ, ALEXANDER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,900.00 FILED BY REYES, JOSEFINA AS TO DEFENDANT BERMUNDEZ, ALEXANDER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF REYES, JOSEFINA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-07-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-07-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
